name: Desertion
text:
(X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.)
The player who broke this treaty gives control of a character they control with the highest printed cost of X or lower to the player who did not break this treaty.

name: Dishonorable Dealings
text:
(X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.)
The player who broke this treaty dishonors a character they control with the highest printed cost of X or lower.

name: Exposed Secrets
text:
(X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.)
The player who did not break this treaty draws X cards.

name: Falling Fortune
text:
(X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.)
The player who broke this treaty loses X fate.

name: Finding a New Lord
text:
(X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.)
The player who did not break this treaty gains X fate.

name: Forgotten Plans
text:
(X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.)
The player who broke this treaty discards X cards from their hand.

name: Second Chances
text:
(X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.)
The player who did not break this treaty distributes X fate among characters they control.

name: Sent to their Deaths
text:
(X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.)
The player who broke this treaty discards a total of X fate from characters they control.

name: Shattered Blades
text:
(X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.)
The player who broke this treaty discards X attachments they control.

name: Spreading Discontent
text:
(X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.)
The player who broke this treaty bows a character they control with the highest printed cost of X or lower.

name: Transgression of Honor
text:
(X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.)
The player who broke this treaty loses X honor.

name: Upholding Bushido
text:
(X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.)
The player who did not break this treaty gains X honor.

name: Slaughtered Village
text: Interrupt: When this province is broken – resolve the effect of each ring claimed on it as if you were the attacking player.

name: Model of Courtesy
text: Interrupt: When a province you control is broken, choose an unbroken province you control – move a ring claimed on the broken province to the chosen province.

name: Karmic Teachings
text: Interrupt: When this province is broken – move each ring claimed on it to your unclaimed ring pool.

name: Strategizing
text: Reaction: After a province you control is revealed – redistribute the rings claimed on your provinces among eligible provinces you control.

name: Fury of the Kami
text: Interrupt: When a province you control is broken, choose a ring claimed on that province – resolve that ring's effect as if you were the attacking player.

name: Shadowed Alleyway
text: Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province, choose another unbroken non-stronghold province you control – move a claimed ring from this province to the chosen province.

name: Fields of the Wind
text: Action: During a conflict at this province, choose 2 rings you claimed on different provinces you control – move each of those rings to the other chosen ring's province.

name: Temple of Daikoku
text:
This province gets +2 strength for each claimed [water] ring.
Forced Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province – place 1 fate on each unclaimed [water] ring.

name: Temple of Jikoju
text:
This province gets +2 strength for each claimed [air] ring.
Forced Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province – place 1 fate on each unclaimed [air] ring.

name: Temple of Osano-wo
text:
This province gets +2 strength for each claimed [earth] ring.
Forced Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province – place 1 fate on each unclaimed [earth] ring.

name: Temple of Shinsei's Wisdom
text:
This province gets +2 strength for each claimed [void] ring.
Forced Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province – place 1 fate on each unclaimed [void] ring.

name: Temple of the Thunders
text:
This province gets +2 strength for each claimed [fire] ring.
Forced Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province – place 1 fate on each unclaimed [fire] ring.

name: Hida Secretkeeper
text: This character gets +2[mil] and +2[pol] while defending a province with 1 or more rings claimed on it.

name: One of the Forgotten
text:
You cannot place fate on this character when it is played from your provinces.
Reaction: After an opponent passes on declaring a conflict, if that opponent controls any ready characters – put 1 fate on this character.

name: Sake House Smuggler
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: During the conflict phase, choose another player – until the end of the phase, the next non-event card you play and the next non-event card that player plays each has its cost to play reduced by 1.

name: Kuni Silencer
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as the defender – your opponent must return a ring from his or her claimed ring pool to the unclaimed ring pool.

name: Roadside Inn
text: Reaction: After the fate phase begins, choose a character. Each opponent may give you 1 honor and choose a character in this way moves 1 fate from their fate pool to their chosen character, if able.

name: Chancellor's Aide
text: Interrupt: When this character leaves play, choose a player. Each opponent may give you 1 honor and choose a player – each chosen player discards a card from their hand.

name: Dazzling Duelist
text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [mil] duel against a character your opponent controls of their choice – resolve the duel. The controller of the duel's loser cannot claim rings during this conflict.

name: Perfect Guest
text: Action: Choose another player – that player gains control of this character and cannot trigger this ability this round.

name: Masterpiece Painter
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: Choose any number of players. – each of those players reveals the top card of their conflict deck. Until the end of the phase, each of those players may play their revealed card as if it were in their hand.

name: Negotiation Table
text:
Action: In turn order, each opponent may select one or more of the following –
• draw 1 card.
• choose and ready a character.
• gain 1 fate.
Then, you do each option once for each opponent that selected that option.

name: Inventive Mirumoto
text:
When you play this character, it enters play under the control of an opponent of your choice.
This character cannot participate in conflicts against its owner.

name: Agasha Prodigy
text: Action: Choose a character. Each opponent may give you 1 honor and choose a character – each player that chose a character discards the top card of their conflict deck. Each attachment a player discards this way is put into play attached to the character that player chose.

name: Ascetic of the North Wall
text: While you have claimed the [earth] ring, this character cannot lose fate or be discarded outside the fate phase.

name: Mindful Warrior
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a ring in your unclaimed ring pool – switch that ring with a ring claimed on one of your provinces, gaining all fate on it.

name: Alchemical Laboratory
text: While you have claimed the [fire] ring, each attachment you control on another player's character gains ancestral.

name: Ikoma Message Runner
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: For each player, choose up to 1 facedown card in that player's provinces – turn each chosen card faceup.

name: Righteous Akodo
text: This character gets +2[pol] while attacking or defending a province with 1 or more rings claimed on it.

name: Battle Aspirant
text: Reaction: After this character is declared as an attacker in a [mil] conflict, choose a character your opponent controls without covert – the chosen character must be declared as a defender in this conflict, if able.

name: Medium of the Living Soul
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character – until the end of the conflict, that character gains: “Reaction: After you resolve a ring effect during a conflict in which this character is participating, remove 1 fate from this character – resolve that effect again.”

name: Bushidō Adherent
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character – honor that character. Your opponent draws 1 card.

name: Expert Interpreter
text: Reaction: After the conflict phase begins, choose a ring. Each opponent may give you 1 honor and choose a ring – during each conflict in which one of the chosen rings is contested this phase, characters cannot enter play.

name: Isawa Pilgrim
text:
Pride.
Action: Choose another player who has claimed the [water] ring – that player gains control of this character.

name: Mediator of Hostilities
text: Reaction: After a player passes on declaring a conflict – draw 1 card. (Limit twice per round.)

name: Serene Seer
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: For each opponent that has claimed the [void] ring, choose a facedown province that player controls – look at each chosen province.

name: Hallowed Ground
text:
Each opponent who has claimed:
• the [air] ring loses 1 honor when they lose a conflict unopposed.
• the [earth] ring cannot claim rings that were claimed on provinces they break.
• the [fire] ring cannot put fate on characters they play.

name: Shepherd of Visages
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character – that character gets -2 glory until the end of the conflict.

name: Shosuro Actor
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a non-unique character you do not control – this character becomes a copy of that character until the end of the conflict.

name: Vice Proprietor
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, dishonor it. Choose an opponent, then that opponent chooses a participating character you do not control – bow that character.

name: Master Whisperer
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: Choose a player – that player discards 3 cards from their hand and draws 3 cards.

name: Acclaimed Geisha House
text: Action: During a conflict, dishonor a (friendly) participating character and choose an unclaimed ring – switch the contested ring with the chosen ring. (The conflict retains its type.)

name: Altansarnai's Vanguard
text: During each conflict against a province with 1 or more rings claimed on it, this character cannot be bowed by card or ring effects.

name: Merchant of Curiosities
text: Action: Discard a card from your hand. Each opponent may give you 1 honor and discard a card from their hand – each player who discards a card this way draws 1 card.

name: Endless Plains Skirmisher
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a player – move this character to the conflict on that player's side. (You still control this character, but its skill contributes towards that player's side in the conflict.)

name: Way Station Trader
text:
Limited. (No more than one limited card can be played by each player each round.)
Reaction: After a province is revealed during a conflict in which this character is participating, choose an opponent – take 1 fate from that opponent.

name: Forthright Ide
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a character with printed cost 3 or lower – ready that character. If you control that character, discard 1 card from you hand.

name: Shika Matchmaker
text: Each card in your hand gains support. (Another player may help pay that card’s fate cost.)

name: Cunning Confidant
text: While participating in a conflict against a player with more claimed rings than you, this character gets +2[pol].

name: Insightful Gatekeeper
text: While participating in a conflict against a player with more claimed rings than you, this character gets +2[mil].

name: Venerable Fortunist
text: Action: Return a ring in your claimed ring pool that matches the element of your role to the unclaimed ring pool – gain 2 fate.

name: Kobo Ichi-Kai Jūjutsu
text:
Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.)
X is equal to the greatest number of rings claimed by a single opponent.

name: Common Cause
text: Action: Sacrifice a (friendly) character and choose another character – ready the chosen character. If that character is controlled by another player, honor it.

name: The Crashing Wave
text:
Support.
Reaction: After an attack is declared against a province but before the province is revealed, choose an eligible province you control – move the conflict to the chosen province and reveal it, if able. You are now the defending player if you were not already.

name: Fulfill Your Duty
text: Action: During a conflict, sacrifice a (friendly) character – the attacked province gets +X strength until the end of the conflict, where X is the sacrificed character’s [mil] skill (including modifiers).

name: A Game of Letters
text:
Action: During a [pol] conflict, choose a participating character and a status token on a character controlled by a different player –
• if you chose an honored status token, honor the chosen character.
• if you chose a dishonored status token, dishonor the chosen character.

name: Favorable Alliance
text:
Support
Action: Set aside cards from the top of up to two conflict decks, yours and that of the player who supports you, until X cards are set aside. Those cards are faceup and out of play. Both you and the player who supports you may play those cards as if they were in their hand.

name: Cultured Façade
text: Action: During a conflict – until the end of the conflict, each participating character cannot be chosen as a target of an event played by a player whose honor bid is higher than that of the character’s controller.

name: Return the Offense
text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [pol] duel between two characters controlled by different players, even if you do not control either of them – resolve the duel. Until the end of the conflict, the duel's winner does not bow as the result of conflict resolution and the duel's loser cannot be readied by card effects.

name: Inscribed Tantō
text: While you have claimed the [void] ring, attached character is immune to opponents' ring effect.

name: Contemplative Wisdom
text:
Restricted. Support.
Attached character gains: “Action: During a conflict, return a ring from your claimed ring pool to the unclaimed ring pool. Choose a participating character – that character gains each of this character’s printed abilities until the end of the conflict.”

name: Unquestioned Heritage
text: Action: If you have claimed the [air] ring, choose an attachment on a character you control – move that attachment to another character.

name: Impossible Kōan
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: During a conflict – set each character's base [mil] and base [pol] skills to 1 until the end of the conflict.

name: Take Up Command
text: Attached character gains the Commander trait and: “Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a Bushi character you control with printed cost 2 or lower – ready that character and move it to the conflict.”

name: Called to War
text: Action: Choose a Bushi character. Each opponent may give you 1 honor and choose a Bushi character – place 1 fate on each chosen character.

name: All Out Assault
text: Reaction: After the conflict phase begins – each time a player has the opportunity to declare an attack this phase, they must attack with as many of their characters as are able.

name: Privileged Position
text: Reaction: After honor dials are revealed during an honor bid – each opponent who bid higher than you cannot declare more than one conflict against you this round.

name: Peacemaker's Blade
text:
This attachment cannot be played on an attacking character.
Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.)
Attached character cannot be declared as an attacker.

name: Trick of the Light
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character – until the end of the conflict, treat the characters as if its printed text box were blanks (except for Traits).

name: Appeal to Sympathy
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Interrupt: When the effects of an event would initiate – cancel those effects and put that event on top of its owner's conflict deck.

name: Ramparts of Stone
text:
Limited. (No more than one limited card can be played by each player each round.)
Action: During a conflict, the attacking player must select one – either bow each participating character they control, or discard 3 cards from their hand.

name: Bayushi Traitor
text:
When you play this character, it enters play under the control of an opponent of your choice.
This character cannot participate in conflicts against its owner.

name: Imbued With Shadows
text: Action: Lose X honor. Choose X characters – discard a status token from each of those characters.

name: Compelling Testimony
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: During a [pol] conflict, choose a participating character – that character gets -4[pol] until the end of the conflict.

name: Criminal Contacts
text:
Play only if your honor bid is higher than an opponent's.
Action: Choose a character. Each opponent may give you 1 honor to choose a character – discard 1 fate from each chosen character.

name: Expert Bartering
text: You may spend 1 fate. Choose another attachment (you may only choose one an opponent controls if you spent 1 fate) – switch this attachment with the chosen attachment. If you do not control the chosen attachment, exchange control of them as well.

name: Way of the Open Hand
text: Action: During a conflict against a non-stronghold province, choose a participating character you do not control – move that character home and put 1 fate on it.

name: Diversionary Maneuver
text: Action: During a [mil] conflict in which you are the attacking player, choose an eligible province not currently being attacked – bow and move home each participating character. Move the conflict to the chosen province and reveal it, if able. Move any number of ready characters you control to the conflict, then your opponent does so as well.

name: Join the Fray
text:
Support.
Action: During a [mil] conflict, choose a Cavalry character in your provinces and a player – put that character into play in the conflict on that player's side. (You still control the character, but its skill contributes towards that player's side in the conflict.)

name: Hige's Sermon
text:
Limited. (No more than one limited card can be played by each player each round.)
Action: During the draw phase, each player in turn order chooses a different character they do not control – bow each of those characters.

name: Seize the Day
text:
Reduce the cost to play this card by 1 if you have 2 or more opponents.
Reaction: After the conflict phase begins – you become the first player.

name: Enlightenment
text: Action: Resolve the effect of each ring in your claimed ring pool as if you were the attacking player. Then, if all five rings are in your claimed ring pool, you win the game.
